STICK WARS

Defend your castle against endless waves of stick figure invaders! Enemies march from the right toward your castle on the left. Shoot projectiles at individual enemies with Z, unleash arrow volleys with SPACE, and deploy powerful special attacks with SHIFT. Collect resources from defeated enemies to upgrade your defenses. Survive as long as possible - the waves never stop getting harder!

Arrow Keys: Move targeting cursor | Z: Fire basic projectile at cursor position | SPACE: Launch arrow volley from castle | SHIFT: Deploy bomber plane (press again to detonate) | ENTER: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and combat testing. Validates that the player can use the targeting cursor to aim and fire projectiles at enemies, and that projectiles correctly damage and eliminate enemies.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the cursor around the screen to track enemies and fire basic projectiles (Z) at them. Test volley attacks (SPACE) periodically. Verify that enemies take damage and die when hit.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test successfully eliminates multiple enemies using different attack types. The game should register hits, enemies should die, and resources should be collected. The test passes if no crashes occur and combat mechanics work correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition validation - survival through multiple waves with optimal strategy. Tests if the game can be won by effectively using all abilities and upgrades to survive increasingly difficult enemy waves.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Implement an optimal combat strategy: prioritize closest enemies with basic shots, use volleys when multiple enemies cluster, deploy bomber planes strategically, and upgrade castle health and damage as resources allow. Focus fire on high-health enemies.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game should demonstrate extended survival through multiple increasingly difficult waves. Castle health should be managed effectively. Resources should accumulate and be spent on upgrades. Test is successful when surviving 10+ waves without game over.
